creator: freebsd@beardz.net
text:
Hi,

Please find attached an updated patch to update 
irc/p5-POE-Component-Server-IRC to v1.49.

This updated patch also :

- Correctly depends on irc/p5-POE-Component-IRC >= 6.68
- Removes a stale dependancy on devel/p5-Object-Pluggable

Please note, this PR now has a dependancy on PR ports/156502

Regards,

Jase.
